creator: keramida@FreeBSD.org
text:
When spell-checking 'HTH' aspell core dumps here.  From a gdb run, it
seems that this is a double-free bug.

Fix: 

Unknown yet...  I've opened issue #2032049 in the bug tracker of aspell
at Sourceforge:

http://sourceforge.net/tracker/index.php?func=detail&aid=2032049&group_id=245&atid=100245
How-To-Repeat: 
: Script started on Wed Jul 30 03:22:04 2008
: keramida@kobe:/home/keramida$ echo HTH | aspell -a
: @(#) International Ispell Version 3.1.20 (but really Aspell 0.60.6)
: Segmentation fault: 11 (core dumped)
